field.name: reponame
field.notes: Derived from git remote (owner/repo's repo part) or folder name in local mode.

field.name: branch
field.notes: Current git branch, or "main" in local mode. Sanitised for filesystem use.

field.name: last_huddle_date
field.notes: YYYY-MM-DD of the most recent wrap-up.

field.name: current_topic
field.notes: Human-readable topic of the most recent / active round.

field.name: latest_summary
field.notes: 2-4 sentence prose summary of the huddle. Drives the graph view's main question + decision_why.

field.name: id
field.notes: Prefix with topic-slug-short, e.g. saas-d1-icp-wedge. Must be unique within state.

field.name: topic
field.notes: One-line title shown in graph node.

field.name: decision
field.notes: One or two sentence statement of what was decided.

field.name: rationale
field.notes: 3-8 sentence prose. Must NAME: the issues framed, any persona pushback (who + what), and any cited refs. Synthesis parses this prose to populate issues[], challenges[], evidence[].

array.name: linked_issues
array.notes: Array of issue ids from issues[]. Creates informs edges issue → decision.

array.name: linked_topics
array.notes: Array of other decision ids this one informs or depends on.

field.name: label
field.notes: Short problem framing. Shown as graph node label.

field.name: raised_by
field.notes: Persona id from persona-roster.xml (e.g. "maya").

field.name: by
field.notes: Persona id issuing the challenge.

field.name: targets
field.notes: Decision id being challenged. Creates challenges edge.

field.name: label
field.notes: Display label; falls back to ref or id.

field.name: ref
field.notes: URL, book, or citation. Domain/auto-label falls out from this.

array.name: linked_decisions
array.notes: Decision ids this evidence supports. Creates supports edge.

element.name: participant
element.coerce: {id: value, name: value, icon: "👤", meta: "", influence: "Participated in this huddle."}

field.name: id
field.notes: Persona id or user id. Falls back to name if missing.

field.name: name
field.notes: Display name. Falls back to id if missing.

field.name: meta
field.notes: Role/title tag. e.g. "Strategy", "Architect". Also accepts role as an alias.

field.name: influence
field.notes: One-line what-they-did description.

field.name: title
field.notes: Also accepts summary or type as aliases.

field.name: detail
field.notes: Also accepts summary or an array evidence joined by " • " as fallback.

field.name: label
field.notes: Also accepts question as an alias.

field.name: targets
field.notes: Decision or issue id this question relates to. Creates needs-answer edge.

array.name: action_items
array.notes: Strings or {id, text, owner, due} — renderer tolerates both.

array.name: active_personas
array.notes: Persona ids that shaped the outcome. Used on resume to restore the room.

graph-view-core.rule: If any of these are missing or malformed, the renderer will surface a fatal error. Everything else is decorative and degrades gracefully.

writer-checklist.rule: Always populate all root required fields.
Every decision id must be unique across decisions[].
Every challenge.targets must reference an existing decision id.
Every evidence.linked_decisions[] id must reference an existing decision id.
Every decision.linked_issues[] id must reference an existing issue id.
Every open_question.targets must reference an existing decision or issue id (or be empty).
Do not fabricate. If rationale doesn't name a challenge or cite evidence, leave those arrays empty.
Prefer the object shape for participants, even when only the id is known — { id, name, icon, meta, influence }.
